review_title: One of the best Employee Engagement Apps + integrated to Teams
description: Excellent. Looking forward to rolling it out to the overall organization, just need to have an handle on how to monitor given the lack of Reporting capabilities
author: Natalie F.
pros: Comprehensive. They have thought about everything. Full integration to Teams. The web app is also very clean and simple to use. Excellent documentation of the features accessible through chat
cons: Reporting. Leaving much to be desired. The out of box reports are not useful at all and there is not much customization available. Exporting of data is also limited to the provided out of box dashboard. Atleast if all the information (doesn't have to be the text) is available to export, we can import into our reporting tool of choice. We are hoping, Teamflect will include these features in upcoming releases.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great way to stay on task
description: Teamflect is helping me stay on task. I like that I can see everything I've done - it makes me feel like I've achieved something! But I can hide the done so I can focus on what I still have left to do. It's a good way to get me back on task or move me on to the next task once I complete a big project.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Teamflect can be pinned on your Outlook Ap and your Teams, making it easy to access and keep up with tasks. It's great for taking meeting notes and assigning tasks right away.
cons: I'd like to be able to make a tasks that will stay off my task list until a future date. For example, if I need to order for an event, I want it on my tasks so I don't forget but I don't need it clogging up my list 3 weeks in advance. I'd like to be able to schedule it to appear at a certain time.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Teamflext Usage Experience and Improvement Areas
description: I really like Teamflext because it provides a one-page summary report on a single screen. For every meeting, it allows recording of discussion points, tracking open action items, and setting up recurring follow-ups. The best part is that Goals, Meetings, Surveys, and Feedback are all integrated on one page, making it very convenient and efficient. Currently, I am using it for my goal reviews and meeting MOMs, and I plan to explore and use other features in the future. However, there is scope to improve the screen view functionality — the current report view has limited zoom options, which makes it slightly difficult to share or discuss details during meetings. Enhancing this with an enlarged or adjustable screen view would further improve the user experience.
author: Sidram A.
pros: I really like Teamflext because it provides a one-page summary report on a single screen. For every meeting, you can record the discussion points, track open action items, and even set up recurring follow-ups. The best part is that it integrates Goals, Meetings, Surveys, and Feedback all on one page, making it very convenient and efficient to use.
cons: There is scope to enhance the screen view functionality. Currently, the report view has limited zoom options, which makes it difficult to discuss or share details effectively during meetings. Improving this feature to allow an enlarged or adjustable screen view would make the discussion experience much better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I’ve found Teamflect to be a highly effective tool for planning and conducting employee meetings. The platform allows for structured, collaborative discussions where both managers and employees can view the agenda in real time and contribute their own comments or reflections. I especially appreciate the customizable layout, which enables me to tailor each meeting to reflect the individual employee’s goals, performance, and development needs. This personalized approach enhances engagement, ensures clarity, and supports meaningful, goal-oriented conversations.
author: Lisa O.
pros: A well-defined and organized structure that promotes consistency, supports collaboration, and ensures that everyone is working toward shared goals.
cons: I’ve found the task feature to be somewhat confusing and less intuitive compared to other areas of the platform. Specifically, when adding a goal, there doesn’t appear to be a clear option to define measurable progress—such as documenting where the employee currently stands and the specific target they should be working toward. Having the ability to track progress from the starting point to the desired outcome would make the goal-setting process more effective and meaningful, while also supporting clearer performance reviews and accountability.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Concise, informative, and highlight the main takeaway or key aspect of the reviewed item. It should also be engaging.
description: Teamflect provides tools for goal setting, feedback, and recognition, which helps create a more structured and consistent approach to employee development, according to multiple software review platforms.
author: Terrance H.
pros: Teamflect's tight integration with Microsoft Teams made it easy for users to access and utilize its features without switching platforms, enhancing overall efficiency.
cons: The out-of-the-box reporting capabilities are often criticized as not being useful, and customization options are limited. Some users have also mentioned issues with exporting data for use in other reporting tools.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

cons: As of right now, the con would be that I don't know it in its entirety. I look forward to learning and developing my skills in Teamflect.

review_title: Good for managing people not just projects
description: Teamflect has allowed me as a manager to not only manage projects but really manage my team especially that we are in a work-at-home set-up most of the time.
author: Levi A.
pros: I liked that it was able to capture monitoring of tasks and targets of the team. It also allowed feedbacking and providing space for one-on-one sessions. It is a deliberate app that does not only care about targets but about each individual team performer.
cons: There are still some things that can be improved like navigating subgoals and tasks. I cannot go to the next task in the goal just by clicking next. However, it is something minor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Amazing! I gave recommended to senior managers to consider, as part of our Microsoft License regime, especially for the monitoring of performance of work, task delivery and completion of appraisal systems. TeamFlect gives accurate unbiased appraisal of staff performance, maps gaps and training needs, receives feedback from all persons within the links (supervisor and the supervised).

description: Liked it, and also saved me a few times by reminding me when tasks are due. its also a great way to track my progress as i can see how far i've come and how much is left either by percentage or as a value.
